MCP — Model Context Protocol

Standardized
One protocol. Any tool. Any agent.
Universal

Pluggable

Session 06

Before & after

$ alc /project:App error AL0118: 'Record' does not contain a definition for 'MyField' error AL0132: Variable 'Cust' is unused Build: FAILED (2 errors)
2 errors12:04:18
⇢
Pipeline Analyzer:
AL0118 — MyField was renamed to MyNewField in v3.2. Update line 47.
AL0132 — Safe to remove; variable was left from a refactor.
